[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00001001 2
1 00000001 1
2 11111010 6
3 01110011 5
4 11010010 4
5 01110000 3
6 10000000 1
7 00100010 2

01 10 00000000 a
12 21 00000010 1
23 32 00010001 2
34 43 00010000 1
45 54 01110010 4
56 65 01010010 3
67 76 01010000 2
70 07 00000000 a

02 20 00000000 a
13 31 00000000 a
24 42 01011010 4
35 53 00010001 2
46 64 11010010 4 match 4
57 75 01110000 3 match 5
60 06 10000000 1 match 6
71 17 00100000 1

03 30 00000000 a
14 41 00100010 2 match 7
25 52 01010011 4
36 63 00010000 1
47 74 01110000 3 match 5
50 05 00000000 a
61 16 00000010 1
72 27 01010000 2

04 40 10000000 1 match 6
15 51 00100010 2 match 7
26 62 01010010 3
37 73 00010000 1
